avoid_this_week: Generic national property market commentary without local angle
Overused motivational real estate quotes with no context
Long-form captions exceeding 150 words on visual posts
recommended_hook_styles: Start with a surprising local stat or number buyers don't expect
Open with a common seller mistake then flip it with advice
Ask a direct question your audience is already wondering
Lead with a bold claim then back it with local proof
